description: Key encounter scenarios for minion/summon targeting and deck-pollution regression.

scenarios.note: Illusion minion (Parafright) should be deprioritized; focus TheObscura.
Disposable ToughEgg minions; kill Ovicopter first.
Summoned bots with MinionPower; kill Fabricator.
Peer summon without MinionPower; no minion wipe heuristic.
Rush FOGMOG on summon/debuff turns; never target EYE_WITH_TEETH while primary alive; avoid block when IN=0.
StatusIntent Slimed injection; attack over defend when kill-before-hit wins.
CardDebuff SmoggyPower affliction modeled via ThreatEconomy power cost.
DebuffStrong shrink is power debuff not block trigger; IN=0 on debuff turn.
Draw-pile peek and reshuffle scoring; rush before RESHUF=1 fills hand with Slimed.
Enemy Strength buff before attack; IN= should reflect buffed damage after enrage move.
Self Strength buff; lethal/block scoring uses CombatDamageCalc when player has Strength.
AllyStrength on team before minion attacks; ActOrder + ordered move effects.
Steal removes high-value card from draw/discard; POLL= drops after steal turn.
AfterHandEmptied draw; playing out hand should not dead-end beam when Top equipped.
ShouldFlush false keeps hand across EndTurn; pile rhythm differs from default flush.
+2 hand draw each turn + Confused power from relic data; draw-pile planning uses EV cost.

Beam ConsiderLeaf regression: E>0, affordable Defend/skill block in hand, IN>0 and net incoming not fully blocked — play block (beam d>=1), not beam end or attack-only. PLAY= should list block; POST_BLK= higher than naked EndTurn line. E=0 after spending is OK; E>0 with beam end while block was affordable is a fail.

Multi-enemy vuln setup: debuff skills (TAUNT/Bash) must pick an enemy target in beam sim; vuln should land on primary focus (LINE= shows TAUNT→eN then Strike→eN same N). scorer-alts →eN should match pick SecondaryIndex (no spurious search). Wasted vuln on A while focusing B should be penalized.
Planner must not use lethal/aoe-lethal/lethal-transform shortcuts; all picks tagged beam d= or beam end. Grep log for absence of [lethal].
When IN>=12 and affordable block covers incoming, LINE should lead with DEFEND/BLOOD_WALL or POST_BLK>=IN before attack-heavy paths. Fail: POST_BLK<<IN with attack-only LINE.
When cannot secure-kill this turn (CanSkipBlockForKill false), prefer block-first lines; next turn POST_PLAY should enable kill with stable HP.
Simulatable potions (FLEX/WEAK/FIRE/ENERGY) should appear in beam LINE= before naked-end; no standalone potion pick log when planner chooses UsePotion. WEAK before attacks on same →eN.
